<Heading
  as={"h1"}
  className={"openapi__heading"}
  children={"Retrieves points for a track"}
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"get"}
  path={"/api/v1/tracks/{track_id}/points"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



Returns location points belonging to a specific track, ordered by timestamp ascending
